flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at City Colleges of Chicago-Wilbur Wright College rose 54% between 2017 and 2020 ($4.2k → $6.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at City Colleges of Chicago-Wilbur Wright College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at City Colleges of Chicago-Wilbur Wright College rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 (7.0% → 8.1%).
